business.name: FirstChoice Roof Care
business.tagline: Macon's roof experts who show up when they say they will

hero.headline: *Every roof* tells a story — we write the ending
hero.subheadline: Storms don't wait. Neither do we. Macon homeowners call us first because we answer, we show up, and we get it done right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every roof problem has a FirstChoice solution
services_section.subheading: From missing shingles to complete replacements — we handle what Middle Georgia weather throws at your home

services.title: Storm Damage Repairs
services.description: Hail, wind, fallen branches — we assess the real damage and fix it right the first time. No surprise callbacks needed.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: When repairs won't cut it anymore, we tear off and build back better. Your neighbors will notice the difference.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Water stains on your ceiling? We find exactly where it's coming from and stop it — guaranteed to stay dry.

services.title: Gutter Services
services.description: Clean, repair, or replace gutters that actually move water away from your foundation like they're supposed to.

about.heading: The roofing company Macon trusts when it matters
about.body: We're the crew Middle Georgia homeowners call when their roof needs real work, not just a band-aid fix. Every job gets our full attention because your home deserves nothing less than our best work.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Macon homeowners say about our work

reviews.name: Ella S.
reviews.text: Professional team that genuinely cares about doing quality work. They were patient with all my questions and made sure I understood everything.

reviews.name: Harper R.
reviews.text: Reliable, skilled, and truly impressive workmanship.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia communities
service_areas.subheading: We know these neighborhoods and the weather challenges they face

cta.heading: Your roof problem won't fix itself
cta.body: Get a straight answer about what your roof needs. Free estimates, honest pricing, and work that lasts.
